description_long: This house is a modern, spacious residential building set on a large green plot with landscaped gardens and multiple outdoor amenities. The structure features a mix of flat and gently sloped roofs, with a combination of white and gray exterior walls accented by large windows. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a swimming pool with a surrounding patio, and several trees and shrubs providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The main entrance is marked by a prominent pathway and a covered porch area. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level offering balconies or terraces overlooking the yard. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat and sloped roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a garage, set on a spacious green lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and garden features.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage entrance, driveway, and a mix of greenery along the property edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and additional garden elements, with the house's rear facade visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch, wide steps, and a modern door with glass panels, flanked by landscaping and a direct path from the driveway.
